# v1.285 — Four-State Parts Status System + Parts Estimate Flag

## What's New

### Parts Status — Four-State System (GH#14)
- **📋 Parts Estimate** (blue, pulsing) — new chip for parts requests that are estimate-only; no order placed yet
- **🔍 Part Sourcing** (neon orange) — actively hunting for parts
- **⚠️ Parts Outstanding** (yellow) — parts ordered, awaiting delivery
- **✅ Parts Received** (green) — all parts have arrived

### For Estimate Only Toggle
- Request Parts modal now has a "For Estimate Only" toggle
- When toggled on, sets `parts_status = 'estimate'` instead of `'outstanding'`
- Manager can later promote an estimate to outstanding once customer approves

### Manager/Admin Controls
- Set Parts Status modal now includes all four state buttons
- Clear button spans full width at the bottom
- Auto-flip to Received still works when all parts rows are marked received

### Filters
- New 📋 Parts Estimate filter button in the Parts filter section
- All four states are now filterable independently

### Manager Role
- Added `bobby@patriotsrvservices.com`, `solar@patriotsrvservices.com`, `brandon@patriotsrvservices.com` to Manager role

### Spanish
- `PARTS ESTIMATE → ESTIMACIÓN DE PARTES`

## Rollback
To roll back to v1.284: `git reset --hard c2c0746 && git push --force`
